title: Israel attacks Beirut as nuclear negotiations with Iran intensify
summary: Israeli attacks in southern Beirut occur as the US and Iran close in on signing a nuclear deal.

summary: The Japanese prime minister meets with British leaders to discuss cooperation on security and the economy.

summary: Brazil and Morocco draw, Scotland secures a historic victory, and Australia surprises Turkey in the World Cup.

summary: Bobby Ologun, well-known TV personality, was detained and denies charges of non-consensual sexual relations.

summary: World leaders gather in France for the G7 summit, amid protests in Geneva and bilateral meetings on various topics.

summary: The Knicks defeat the Spurs and secure their first NBA title in over five decades, sparking riots among fans.

summary: From Vinicius playing barefoot to Dutch fans in costume, various human stories surround the World Cup.

summary: People of different ages die in separate drowning incidents across Japan, including a child and an elderly person.

summary: In the national athletics championships and ekiden races, new names stand out and university teams show their strength.

summary: The quake causes significant damage and alters coastal geography, according to reports.

title: Storing radioactive waste in Fukushima becomes constant challenge

title: Health workers battle Ebola in Congo camps amid distrust
summary: Community distrust complicates efforts to contain the Ebola outbreak in camps in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
